title: Convenient survival
description: A mod that adds convenient features that allow you to get materials normally obtained through mobs in a safer way
body:
This mod tries to implement features like custom ores and items to make the game more convenient, especially for players who don't want to fight many mobs or peaceful mode players.


for now the mod implements: 

- prismarine ore = the prismarine ore can be found from y40 to y10 in all ocean biomes, it can be mined with a stone pickaxe and drops prismarine shards.

- bones ore = the bones ore can be found anywhere in the overworld from y64 to y0, it can be mined with a stone pickaxe and drops bones.

- blazing netherrack = blazing netherrack can be found anywhere in the nether from y100 to y0, it can be mined with a stone pickaxe and drops blazing coal.

- blazing coal = blazing coal is an item that can be used as fuel to smelt 6 items, or crafted into blaze powder.

- ender calcite ore = the ender calcite ore can be found anywhere in the outher end islands from y120 to y0, it can be mined with an iron pickaxe and drops ender calcite.

- ender calcite = ender calcite is an item that can be used to craft a shulker shell using 3 ender calcite and 2 popped chorus fruit in an helmet shape.

- trident recipe = tridents can now be crafted with 2 diamonds, 1 heart of the sea and 2 prismarine shards.

- blazing coal block = a block of blazing coal, crafted from 9 blazing coal, it can smelt 9 times the amout of items a blazing coal item can.

- sulfur = sulfur is an item dropped by the sulfur ore and the deepslate sulfur ore, it can be used as fuel smelting 8 items or crafted with coal and charcoal into gunpowder.

- sulfur ore = sulfur ore is an ore that can be found between y54 and y0, it can be mined with a stone pickaxe and drops sulfur.

- deepslate sulfur ore = deepslate sulfur ore is an ore that can be found between y0 and y-32, it can be mined with a stone pickaxe and drops sulfur.

- sulfur block = a block of sulfur, crafted from 9 sulfur, it can smelt 9 times the amout of items a sulfur item can.


Curseforge version at : https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/convenient-survival
